name: IOU Financial Inc.
summary: IOU Financial Inc., through its subsidiary, IOU Central Inc., operates an Internet-based commercial lending business in North America. The company originates and sells commercial loans receivable to third party purchasers; and services loans that are sold to third party purchasers on a non-recourse basis. It serves medical and dental practices, and grocery and retail stores. IOU Financial Inc. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
